meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Marketing for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional, conversion-ready apps that market themselves.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between technical execution and marketing by baking lead-gen and SEO architecture directly into your codebase. By leveraging Claude Code to scaffold these assets, you transform your freelance development workflow into a high-converting machine, ensuring every line of code actively serves your business growth.
content.intro:
You are a master of syntax, yet your projects languish in obscurity because you treat marketing as an afterthought. Every hour spent debugging is an hour lost to the silence of a market that doesn't know you exist. The friction between 'shipping code' and 'shipping value' is where most freelance careers go to die.

But what if your project template did the heavy lifting? By integrating the Antigravity framework, you turn your codebase into a marketing asset. We are moving beyond simple boilerplate to an architecture designed to capture leads, optimize for search, and tell your product's story automatically. It is time to stop building in a vacuum and start building for scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base structure that prioritizes SEO-friendly routing and metadata management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with a focus on high-conversion landing page structure, SEO meta-tag injection, and analytics integration.

steps.title: Automate Copywriting with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate marketing-aligned copy based on your technical specs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project requirements and generate high-converting hero copy, feature benefits, and a compelling CTA for the landing page.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate landing page copy based on project.md'

steps.title: Integrate Lead-Gen Components
steps.description: Embed functional lead capture forms that sync directly to your CRM/database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a modular lead-generation component that captures emails and pushes them to my configured API endpoint.

steps.title: Implement SEO Metadata Architecture
steps.description: Ensure your app is indexable by configuring dynamic OpenGraph tags and structured data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure dynamic meta tag generation for all routes to ensure optimal SEO performance and social media sharing previews.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement dynamic seo tags across all routes'

steps.title: Deploy with Marketing Analytics
steps.description: Finalize the build with automated tracking to measure user behavior from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add Google Analytics and Hotjar tracking snippets to the project initialization flow.

pro_tips: Treat your README.md as your primary marketing document; use Claude Code to keep it updated with every feature push.
Inject UTM parameters into your internal app links to track exactly which feature drives the most user interest.
Use Antigravity's built-in preview environments to show clients 'live' marketing pages before the app logic is even finished.
Always modularize your 'marketing' code into a separate directory so it doesn't clutter your core business logic.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' feature to audit your landing page copy against your target persona's pain points.
resources: SEO Best Practices for Devs: https://developers.google.com/search/docs
content.next_steps: Once your template is live, run a lighthouse audit to confirm your marketing assets are optimized for speed, then begin your first client outreach campaign.
content.conversion_block: Stop building apps that nobody sees and start shipping products that sell themselves. With the Antigravity template, you gain the marketing leverage of a full agency with the speed of a solo developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
